name: MEDDPICC
summary: An enterprise qualification framework that extends MEDDIC by adding Paper Process and Competition so late-stage risk is surfaced earlier.
whenToUseIt: Use MEDDPICC in complex B2B and enterprise deals where legal, procurement, formal approvals, and competitive pressure materially affect win rate and forecast confidence. Some teams say MEDDPPICC or add Partner; treat those as variants of the same core model.
steps: Inspect the classic MEDDIC elements: Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, Decision Process, Identify Pain, and Champion.
Add Paper Process so legal, procurement, security, and approval mechanics are mapped before late stage.
Inspect Competition explicitly so you know whether you are fighting another vendor, the status quo, or an internal option.
example: A deal looks healthy on MEDDIC, but MEDDPICC reveals that procurement requires a master services agreement, security review takes three weeks, and the incumbent vendor has a renewal discount waiting in the wings. The rep now sees the real risk profile.
